hero.title: Run Your Agency & Hotels, or Book Your Dream Trip All in One Place
hero.subtitle: Operate multiple agencies, centralize hotel management, and enable seamless booking workflows from a single dashboard.

features.label: OUR SERVICES
features.heading: Run your entire hotel operations from one seamless platform

cards.name: Multi-Agency Management
cards.desc: Manage multiple agencies from one platform with separated workspaces, team roles, and full control over each business unit.

cards.name: Hotel & Property Operations
cards.desc: Add hotels, organize branches, and keep property information centralized so your teams move faster with less operational confusion.

cards.name: Room Inventory Control
cards.desc: Track room types, availability, and status in real time to reduce errors and keep inventory ready for booking teams.

cards.name: Smart Booking Workflows
cards.desc: Handle booking requests from creation to confirmation with a streamlined flow that improves conversion and customer experience.

cards.name: Role-Based Team Access
cards.desc: Give each user the right level of access, so agencies, managers, and staff can collaborate securely without permission conflicts.

cards.name: Actionable Performance Insights
cards.desc: Monitor booking activity, property performance, and agency productivity with clear insights that support faster decisions.

hotelShowcase.label: HOTELS YOU CAN SCALE
hotelShowcase.heading: Turn every visit into a confirmed booking
hotelShowcase.body: Drive more bookings from every hotel you showcase.

items.title: City Hotels
items.description: Popular stays in top city locations, easy to book and always in demand.

items.title: Resorts & Getaways
items.description: Relaxing stays designed for comfort, leisure, and memorable experiences.

items.title: Business Hotels
items.description: Reliable stays built for work trips and fast business decisions.

whyBook.label: WHY BOOK WITH US
whyBook.heading: Clarity in every stay, confidence in every booking
whyBook.body: Before booking, guests look for clarity, trust, and reassurance. This section brings those reasons into focus.

items.title: Better value when booking direct
items.desc: Clear pricing and stronger value without surprises at checkout.

items.title: Instant confirmation
items.desc: Booking confirmed the moment payment is completed.

items.title: Flexible stays
items.desc: Simple policies that make planning feel safe and easy.

items.title: Clear trust signals
items.desc: Accurate photos, verified details, and transparent amenities.

offers.label: Special Offers
offers.heading: Smart offers that make booking an easy decision
offers.body: Real opportunities that deliver better value and turn hesitation into a quick, clear booking decision.

items.title: Better rates for early planners
items.desc: Book early to unlock better prices on selected rooms, especially during high-demand periods and peak seasons.

items.title: Feels more like home than a hotel
items.desc: A comfortable stay with family-friendly benefits like space, ease, and services that make every stay smoother.

items.title: The longer you stay, the better the value
items.desc: Get better value when extending your stay, with clearer per-night pricing as the booking duration increases.

plans.label: SUBSCRIPTION PLANS
plans.heading: Choose the right plan for the way your hotel business operates
plans.body: Start with a simple plan, grow into deeper reporting and multi-property control, or move to a custom enterprise setup when your operation needs full flexibility.

guestExperience.label: BOOK WITH CONFIDENCE
guestExperience.heading: Everything you need to book with confidence — no surprises, no stress
guestExperience.body: We make sure every listing is accurate, every deal is fair, and every booking is protected — so you can focus on enjoying your trip.

items.title: Your booking is protected from the moment you confirm
items.desc: Every reservation is secured and documented. No cancellations without notice, no hidden changes — your plans stay exactly as you made them.

items.title: Prices you see are prices you pay
items.desc: No hidden fees added at checkout. The total shown includes everything — so you can budget your trip without any last-minute surprises.

items.title: Verified hotels and agencies — only the trusted ones
items.desc: Every hotel and agency on our platform goes through a verification process. You are only seeing listings from providers we have reviewed and approved.

items.title: Real reviews from real guests
items.desc: Ratings and feedback come from verified bookings only — not anonymous posts. What you read reflects what people actually experienced.

items.title: Support that responds before your trip, not after
items.desc: Have a question before you book or need to make a change? Our support team is here to help — fast, clear, and on your side.

items.title: Your rights as a guest are always respected
items.desc: Clear cancellation policies, fair refund terms, and transparent communication — because we believe every traveler deserves to be treated right.

operationsPulse.label: Operations Hub
operationsPulse.heading: All hotel operations in one clear place
operationsPulse.body: Track bookings, availability, and requests easily, and let your team work faster with less distraction.
operationsPulse.mainTitle: Everything under control in one view
operationsPulse.mainBody: A single dashboard that brings all hotel operations together for faster and clearer decisions.

cards.title: Never miss a guest request
cards.desc: Every inquiry or booking comes through clearly and instantly.

cards.title: Real-time room updates
cards.desc: See what’s available and what’s booked instantly without delays.

cards.title: Organized agency workflow
cards.desc: Each agency follows a clear flow without confusion or overlap.

cards.title: Faster team, smarter control
cards.desc: Structured permissions that keep work fast and organized.

momentumWall.label: Why it feels better
momentumWall.heading: Built to make hotel operations faster, cleaner, and more premium
momentumWall.body: This is not just a data dashboard. It’s a system designed to reduce friction, improve clarity, and elevate confidence in every operational step.

cards.title: Less communication between teams
cards.desc: A unified workflow reduces the need to chase updates across agencies, operations, and reservation teams.

cards.title: Faster guest responses
cards.desc: Real-time visibility into rooms, requests, and hotel data helps teams respond and confirm faster.

cards.title: A more premium experience
cards.desc: Better backend organization translates into a smoother, more professional guest experience.

cards.title: Clearer decisions with higher confidence
cards.desc: From inquiry to confirmation, every step is guided by clarity instead of guesswork.

momentumWall.note: Well-structured systems don’t just save time — they elevate the entire hospitality experience.

codeDemo.label: SYSTEM OVERVIEW
codeDemo.heading: Run hotel operations from one clear control center
codeDemo.body: Your team can monitor hotels, room inventory, booking requests, and agency activity from a single workflow built for fast decisions and cleaner coordination.
bullets: Track hotel inventory, room availability, and booking status in one place
Give each agency and staff member the right role with controlled access
Move requests from inquiry to confirmation with a cleaner booking workflow

techStack.label: TECH STACK
techStack.heading: Eight libraries. One command.
techStack.subheading: Every dependency in the generated project is chosen for real production use. Here's what you get and why it's there.

cards.name: Next.js 15
cards.desc: App Router, Server Components, Layouts, and middleware — the full feature set, not a pages-directory fallback.

cards.name: Material UI v7
cards.desc: Theming, dark mode, RTL layout, and per-component overrides all pre-configured. Use the design system immediately.

cards.name: CASL
cards.desc: Attribute-based access control with a four-role hierarchy. Middleware enforces it. Client hooks expose it.

cards.name: TanStack Query v5
cards.desc: Caching, background refetch, and loading states configured with sensible defaults. No manual fetch boilerplate.

cards.name: React Hook Form
cards.desc: Strongly-typed, performant forms. Used on the login and signup pages out of the box with full validation wiring.

cards.name: i18next
cards.desc: English and Arabic with automatic RTL detection. Language preference is persisted to localStorage.

cards.name: Axios
cards.desc: Interceptors handle JWT injection, 401 token refresh, and auto-logout. One Axios instance, fully configured.

cards.name: TypeScript
cards.desc: Full coverage: CASL ability types, role enums, API response shapes, and Next.js 15 server component props.

techStack.callout: Tailwind CSS v4 — zero-config utility classes, added at scaffold time

whatYouGet.label: WHAT YOU GET
whatYouGet.heading: A working app, not a starting point.
whatYouGet.body: Open your editor to a project that already does something. Every file below is scaffolded and wired on the first run.

includedItems.title: Login page
includedItems.desc: React Hook Form with validation. JWT stored in localStorage and mirrored to cookies for SSR.

includedItems.title: Protected dashboard layout
includedItems.desc: Collapsible sidebar with nested routes and responsive design. Only accessible to authenticated users.

includedItems.title: CASL authorization
includedItems.desc: Route map + middleware check on every request. Add a protected route by editing one file.

includedItems.title: Auth context
includedItems.desc: login(), logout() with token storage, user state, and auto-redirect on session expiry.

includedItems.title: Settings context
includedItems.desc: Theme mode (dark/light), UI direction (LTR/RTL), and language — persisted to localStorage.

includedItems.title: MUI theme system
includedItems.desc: core/theme/overrides/ with one file per MUI component. Change global tokens without touching internals.

includedItems.title: Axios API client
includedItems.desc: Request interceptor injects the access token. Response interceptor handles 401 refresh and cascade logout.

includedItems.title: MSW mock layer
includedItems.desc: Mock Service Worker pre-configured for local development. Swap real endpoints in when ready.

howItWorks.label: How it works
howItWorks.heading: From first inquiry to confirmed booking
howItWorks.body: A simple, fast booking flow that helps you handle guest requests and turn them into confirmed reservations without complexity.

steps.title: Receive booking requests
steps.desc: Guest details like dates, budget, and room type appear clearly in one place.
points: All booking information in one view

steps.title: Present matching hotels
steps.desc: Show relevant hotel options with clear images and details to help guests decide quickly.

steps.title: Complete the booking
steps.desc: Turn the selection into a confirmed booking through a simple final step.

faq.label: FAQ
faq.heading: What agencies and hotel teams ask first

items.question: Can I manage more than one agency from the same system?
items.answer: Yes. The platform is designed for multi-agency operations, so each agency can work inside a structured environment while management still keeps clear oversight across hotels, bookings, and team activity.

items.question: Can the system track hotels, rooms, and availability in one place?
items.answer: Yes. You can organize hotels, manage room types, monitor room status, and follow availability from one dashboard so booking teams always work with updated inventory.

items.question: How does the booking workflow move from inquiry to confirmation?
items.answer: The workflow is built to move clearly from guest request to hotel matching, quotation, follow-up, and final booking confirmation. This helps teams reduce confusion and respond faster with a more professional experience.

items.question: Can different team members have different access levels?
items.answer: Yes. The system supports role-based access so admins, managers, agency staff, and other users can each work within the permissions that match their responsibility.

items.question: Does the platform support Arabic and English usage?
items.answer: Yes. The interface is built to support both Arabic and English, which makes it easier for teams to work in the language and layout direction that fits their daily operations.

cta.label: GET STARTED
cta.heading: Your next project starts here
cta.body: Auth, roles, theming, i18n, and data fetching — scaffolded in under 30 seconds. Open your editor to a working dashboard, not an empty folder.

brand.name: .Hotel Agency
brand.desc: A premium platform for managing agencies, hotels, room inventory, and booking requests through one organized operational flow.

getStarted.heading: Start managing hotels and bookings from one clean dashboard.
getStarted.note: Sign in to monitor agencies, hotels, room availability, and booking activity in real time.
